node.name: Crystal Monolith, Belvedere
node.description: Perched at the apex of the gardens' central spire, this carved crystal platform commands an all-encompassing view of the adjacent grounds. Floating terraces encircle the monolith below, surrounded themselves by a larger ring of airborne islands. Further out, a wall of constantly shifting light enfolds the lofty gardens in a massive sphere, obscuring everything beyond its boundaries.

node.name: Crystal Monolith, Stairway
node.description: Glittering stairs wind along the inner wall of the crystal tower, spiraling about an elaborate gyroscopic device curiously suspended in midair over the rotunda below.

node.name: Crystal Monolith, Rotunda
node.description: Rays of prismatic light filter through thick quartz walls, bathing the grand circular gallery in an ethereal glow. The chamber interior is sparse and utilitarian, unfurnished aside from an aetheric distillery centered on the floor, the gurgle of the strange apparatus echoing softly throughout the rotunda.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou
node.description: Aided by persistent black fog and the dense canopy of moss-knit cypress, a willful gloom strangles the bayou through day and night alike. Adding to the oppression, a stale odor permeates the moist air.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou
node.description: Somber shadows grip the forested swampland. Like an army of slender ghosts advancing on the path, dark tree trunks shrouded in moss drift in and out of visibility in the heavily shifting fog.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou
node.description: The damp, fog-shrouded path wends its way through the ancient cypress and tupelo, gaining height as it approaches the great limestone cliffs to the west.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou
node.description: An imposing limestone bluff delineates the western edge of the swamplands here. Years of muddy runoff have accumulated along a softer incline of the rock face, forming a mucky slope that ascends out of the bayou.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou
node.description: Stacked stone blocks scattered amidst the soggy vegetation suggest the remnants of ancient buildings here. The hewn basalt, likely mined from the nearby Dragonspine Mountains in long-forgotten times, has admirably resisted erosion, while any other construction elements have long since decomposed into the swamp.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou
node.description: The oppressively dark and dense forest presses in from all directions, challenging progress through the swamp. As further hindrance, woody cypress knees project from the ground like spears defending the unwrought path.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou
node.description: Splintered at the base, a fallen bald cypress has begun to decay along the muddy path. It sports a thick coat of hairy moss and a speckling of fuchsia-capped mushrooms, both of which have also begun spreading onto the surrounding earth.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou
node.description: A collapsed stone arch lies half-buried and overgrown with wiregrass beneath a low groundsel tree. Similar bits of crumbling wall and other basalt rubble are visible deeper in the undergrowth.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou
node.description: Gaps between the dense cypress and their spinous knees define the narrow path cutting through the swamp. Scraggly grey moss dangles from the branches above, threatening to ensnare unwary passerby.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou
node.description: The solitary remains of an archaic stone hearth poke above the wiregrass and reeds here. In contrast to its air of bygone abandonment, the silhouettes of man-made construction and the flickering of torchlight can just barely be made out through the swamp timbers to the north.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou
node.description: The woods abate as the earth becomes quaggy in its approach to the bayou. Emerging through the thinning trees, the path skirts the shoreline and affords a clear view of a stilted encampment with flickering lights situated out on the open water to the north.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Sheltered Bank
node.description: A welcome aid to footing, cattails and maidencane crowd the steep embankment that slopes down to the water's edge, where wood piles begin to rise from the mud to support the raised encampment overhead. Enjoying this stagnant corner of bayou, patches of duckweed float lazily amongst the cypress poles.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou
node.description: The slimy track comes to an end at the water's edge, with just a thin span of packed shoreline separating the forested marshland from the inky depths beyond. Above the path, a shroud of shaggy moss dangles limply in the damp air.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou
node.description: From here at the shoreline's nearest point, the northern encampment is more clearly visible as a haphazard collection of boxy shacks strung together by uneven boardwalk. A rickety bridge proceeds over the black water, curving towards the crude pile-supported buildings.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Encampment Gate
node.description: Arching over the inky divide between shoreline and encampment is a narrow bridge of rope-lashed planks. A pair of Black Fang recruits converse in hushed tones just inside the encampment gate -- a clear indication that undetected entry is impossible from this approach.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Beneath the Encampment
node.description: A maze of wood piling rises from the inky waters to support the crude encampment overhead. Many piles are crooked and poorly hewn, an indication that prompt completion was prioritized over construction quality.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Beneath the Encampment
node.description: A maze of wood piling rises from the inky waters to support the crude encampment overhead. The bayou laps softly against the piles, patiently working to draw the rickety structures down into its murky depths.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Beneath the Encampment
node.description: A maze of wood piling rises from the inky waters to support the crude encampment overhead. The bayou laps softly against the piles, patiently working to draw the rickety structures down into its murky depths.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Beneath the Encampment
node.description: Finding refuge from unseen predators prowling the dark water, a swamp toad with multicolored warts lounges on a broken pile beneath a sagging section of the overhead walkway.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Beneath the Encampment
node.description: A maze of wood piling rises from the inky waters to support the crude encampment overhead. Many piles are crooked and poorly hewn, an indication that prompt completion was prioritized over construction quality.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Beneath the Encampment
node.description: Several rotted pilings have collapsed here, plunging a section of the overhead walkway into the pitch-black swamp.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Beneath the Encampment
node.description: A maze of wood piling rises from the inky waters to support the crude encampment overhead. The bayou laps softly against the piles, patiently working to draw the rickety structures down into its murky depths.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Beneath the Encampment
node.description: A low fog snakes between the crooked pilings and clings to the ebony surface of the swamp, further obscuring the unseen dangers lurking below.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Beneath the Encampment
node.description: Draped from the railing overhead, a tangle of moldy cargo netting acts as a paltry barrier between the encampment's dark underbelly and the open bayou beyond.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Beneath the Encampment
node.description: A maze of wood piling rises from the inky waters to support the crude encampment overhead. Many piles are crooked and poorly hewn, an indication that prompt completion was prioritized over construction quality.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Beneath the Encampment
node.description: A maze of wood piling rises from the inky waters to support the crude encampment overhead. The bayou laps softly against the piles, patiently working to draw the rickety structures down into its murky depths.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Beneath the Encampment
node.description: A maze of wood piling rises from the inky waters to support the crude encampment overhead. Many piles are crooked and poorly hewn, an indication that prompt completion was prioritized over construction quality.

node.name: Black Fang Encampment
node.description: A heavy stack of rope-bound crates has buckled part of the walkway here. In lieu of a proper fix, a length of wood railing has been amended to the twisted boardwalk for ostensibly safer passage.

node.name: Black Fang Encampment
node.description: Veiled in swamp fog, rough-hewn cypress planks creak plaintively as the boardwalk totters under the weight of its structural burden and the unremitting slosh of the black bayou below.

node.name: Black Fang Encampment
node.description: Supported on more stilt-like piles, a simple hut sits on an intersection of elevated boardwalk here. Plumes of smoke waft from an opening in its roof and dissipate slowly into the swamp fog.

node.name: Black Fang Encampment
node.description: The uneven plank walkway zigzags over the swamp, its course evidently dictated by suitable piling placement more than any particular architectural design.

node.name: Black Fang Encampment
node.description: Black swamp fog hangs heavy in the air, rolling over water and walkway alike with unhindered caprice. It clings to everything like an oily, clammy film.

node.name: Black Fang Encampment
node.description: Despite its evidently recent construction, the boardwalk-bound wood encampment is already showing signs of dilapidation at the merciless hand of the humid bayou. Moldering planks and tottering piles suggest eventual if not imminent collapse by decay.

node.name: Black Fang Encampment
node.description: A stand of mature bald cypress abuts the western edge of the encampment here, draping their mossy beards onto the boardwalk and adjoining stilt houses.

node.name: Black Fang Encampment
node.description: Tendrils of oily black fog curl up from the bayou below and drape the walkway in soggy shadows, making footing on the ramshackle boardwalk all the more uncertain.

node.name: Black Fang Encampment
node.description: The walkway ends here abruptly at a collapsed section of encampment. Splintered piles and shattered planks form a jumbled heap of wreckage that juts pathetically from the dark water below.

node.name: Black Fang Encampment
node.description: Tendrils of oily black fog curl up from the bayou below and drape the walkway in soggy shadows, making footing on the ramshackle boardwalk all the more uncertain.

node.name: Black Fang Encampment
node.description: The boardwalk widens here to allow space for a dingy canvas tent erected unceremoniously on the uneven plank surface. A sloppy patch in the fabric stands out as one of the scarce few signs of intentional upkeep evident around the encampment.

node.name: Black Fang Encampment
node.description: Despite its evidently recent construction, the boardwalk-bound wood encampment is already showing signs of dilapidation at the merciless hand of the humid bayou. Moldering planks and tottering piles suggest eventual if not imminent collapse by decay.

node.name: Black Fang Encampment
node.description: A broad cypress-framed building sits on a slumping corner of boardwalk here, weighing down the pile-supported platform precariously. The dark bayou waters slosh eagerly below, awaiting an inevitable collapse.

node.name: Black Fang Encampment, Main Gate
node.description: Just inside the encampment gate, the stilted plank walkway splits into an approximate square around a massive water tupelo emerging from the underlying swamp. Torches flank the gate, but the range of their illumination is severely limited by the pervasive black fog.

node.name: Black Fang Encampment
node.description: Although gaps in the hastily constructed cypress plank walkway afford only futile glimpses into the pitch dark below, the buzz of insects and gentle lapping of water serve as persistent reminders of the swamp just underfoot.

node.name: Black Fang Encampment
node.description: Black swamp fog hangs heavy in the air, rolling over water and walkway alike with unhindered caprice. It clings to everything like an oily, clammy film.

node.name: Black Fang Encampment
node.description: Tucked away at the back of the camp, a nondescript shack leans unsteadily over the boardwalk's edge, its free-hanging end poorly supported on a just few bowed piles.

node.name: Black Fang Encampment
node.description: Tendrils of oily black fog curl up from the bayou below and drape the walkway in soggy shadows, making footing on the ramshackle boardwalk all the more uncertain.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: A thick layer of low-lying swamp fog rolls steadily off the water's surface and dissipates into an oppressive mugginess. The bordering marsh reeds express their lassitude by donning sweaty coats of black condensation.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: Waterlogged cypress trees choke the swampy shallows, forcing traffic along the open bayou where sheets of sickly green algae drift languorously along on the sluggish current.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou
node.description: The stretch of mucky shoreline threads between a stand of tangled mangrove on the open bayou and a lichen-covered deadfall looming to the southeast. A crunchy rustle briefly draws your attention to a muskrat disappearing into the dark mass of riven vegetation.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou
node.description: Several mangrove trees have accrued a swath of mud around their densely woven roots here, creating a sludgy mire that extends all the way to the deadfall-crowded eastern shoreline.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: In the dim light that barely manages to suffuse the widespread gloom, the surrounding swamp is naught but a single ebony silhouette set against the distant sky. Only a few scattered ripples on the ink-black water punctuate the darkness.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: Waterlogged cypress trees choke the swampy shallows, forcing traffic along the open bayou where sheets of sickly green algae drift languorously along on the sluggish current.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: The indolent black current skirts a cluster of mangrove trees to south as it oozes through the foggy darkness. Sensing unwanted company, something slithers out of the tangled roots and disappears down into the inky water before there's a chance to catch a proper glimpse.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: The stench of decay and stagnation lingers in the low fog that clings tenaciously to the surface of the bayou. Nearby, distinctly tapered water tupelos thrive in the dark, marshy climate.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: The black swamp waters exude a sense of melancholy isolation that belies the bayou's many hidden dangers. The wistful lull is easily dismissed, but the chill of the murky water doggedly persists.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: Beards of scraggly grey moss droop from cypress boughs along the bayou, forming a lacy shroud that further filters what scant light manages to pierce the borders of the shadowy marsh.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou
node.description: A buildup of gritty silt affords a welcome respite from the algid black water here. At the peak of the tiny barrier island, a crooked bogbirch sapling bravely endeavors to reach maturity without toppling into the bayou.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: In the dim light that barely manages to suffuse the widespread gloom, the surrounding swamp is naught but a single ebony silhouette set against the distant sky. Only a few scattered ripples on the ink-black water punctuate the darkness.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: A fallen tupelo lies amongst the prolific bald cypress that line the swamp. A few snapping turtles lurk about the moss-covered trunk, feasting on the larvae and tadpoles that had hoped to find shelter beneath it.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou
node.description: Cordgrass and cattails grow in abundance along the dunes of a short barrier island here. The relatively low vegetation affords a glimpse of the wooden encampment to the west, its sparse lights dancing eerily on the dark open water.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: In the dim light that barely manages to suffuse the widespread gloom, the surrounding swamp is naught but a single ebony silhouette set against the distant sky. Only a few scattered ripples on the ink-black water punctuate the darkness.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: Waterlogged cypress trees choke the swampy shallows, forcing traffic along the open bayou where sheets of sickly green algae drift languorously along on the sluggish current.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou
node.description: Protruding from the viscous muck, the remains of half a crocodile have washed out of the bayou and begun to decompose ashore. The missing head, lacerated hide, and peculiar way the beast seems to have been violently torn asunder lend an especially unsettling atmosphere to the gruesome scene.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: The indolent sloshing of the brackish swamp is occasionally interrupted by the splash of a diving frog or the emergence of a hungry fish leaping for gnats.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: Beards of scraggly grey moss droop from cypress boughs along the bayou, forming a lacy shroud that further filters what scant light manages to pierce the borders of the shadowy marsh.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: Waterlogged cypress trees choke the swampy shallows, forcing traffic along the open bayou where sheets of sickly green algae drift languorously along on the sluggish current.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: The roots of an old mangrove have been curiously hacked and shredded here, almost as if there was a frenzied attempt at reaching something sheltered beneath the tree. Bits of bark and other detritus still float nearby.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: Adding another element of peril to passage through the waterway, an abundance of tapered cypress knees pierce the bayou surface here like a barricade of forbidding spikes. Floating beds of duckweed fill the space between slender woody growths.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: The indolent sloshing of the brackish swamp is occasionally interrupted by the splash of a diving frog or the emergence of a hungry fish leaping for gnats.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou
node.description: A patch of disturbed mud and trampled saltgrass marks what appears to be a ransacked crocodile nest. A few intact eggs remain amidst a scattering of leathery fragments in the hole, but neither mother croc nor whatever perpetrated this destruction are anywhere to be seen.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou
node.description: Rising meekly from the black water, a low barrier island of silty dunes sports a profusion of waist-high saltgrass. The stretch of land disappears beneath the thick verdure as it extends further north.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou
node.description: A thick fence of rushes hems along the muck here, stretching far to the south and west with minimal gaps. Occasionally something hidden rustles in the leafy expanse, causing the surrounding stalks to sway sharply in telling response.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: In the dim light that barely manages to suffuse the widespread gloom, the surrounding swamp is naught but a single ebony silhouette set against the distant sky. Only a few scattered ripples on the ink-black water punctuate the darkness.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: Deteriorating into the bayou, a fallen tupelo sapling and several splintered cypress knees suggest that some destructive force recently frenzied through the area. Nearby, something unidentifiable slithers by on the black waters, apparently unconcerned.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou
node.description: The indistinct shoreline presents itself here as a wide swath of glutinous mud. Leafy stalks of maidencane rise from the watery slime, flourishing in the semiaquatic conditions, while a few clusters of glasswort have taken up residence on some of the dryer patches of swampland.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: A thick layer of low-lying swamp fog rolls steadily off the water's surface and dissipates into an oppressive mugginess. The bordering marsh reeds express their lassitude by donning sweaty coats of black condensation.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: The stench of decay and stagnation lingers in the low fog that tenaciously clings to the surface of the bayou. Nearby, a distinctly tapered water tupelo thrives in the dark, marshy climate.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: The black swamp waters exude a sense of melancholy isolation that belies the bayou's many hidden dangers. The wistful lull is easily dismissed, but the chill of the murky water doggedly persists.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou
node.description: A deadfall of cypress and black willow contribute to the foundation of a sizable sandbar, their interwoven roots and branches a natural filter for silt and other runoff. Through the moss-shrouded trees to the south, flickers of torchlight are occasionally visible.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: Beards of scraggly grey moss droop from cypress boughs along the bayou, forming a lacy shroud that further filters what scant light manages to pierce the borders of the shadowy marsh.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: Waterlogged cypress trees choke the swampy shallows, forcing traffic along the open bayou where sheets of sickly green algae drift languorously along on the sluggish current.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou
node.description: The indistinct shoreline presents itself here as a wide swath of glutinous mud. Leafy stalks of maidencane rise from the watery slime, flourishing in the semi aquatic conditions, while a few patches of glasswort have taken up residence on some of the dryer patches of swampland.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: Amidst slimy wooden pilings, a layer of algae binds scattered water lilies to a bright backdrop of chartreuse--a rare oasis of color and beauty this grim, shadowy place.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: Waterlogged cypress trees choke the swampy shallows, forcing traffic along the open bayou where sheets of sickly green algae drift languorously along on the sluggish current.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Open Water
node.description: Spear-like cypress knees and wreckage from a collapsed portion of encampment collude to block off southward passage here. Black waters lap indifferently against the obstacles.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou
node.description: The packed mud shoreline transitions into drier earth as it ascends north towards the forest, where fir and cedar begin to replace the prolific bald cypress of the swamp.

node.name: Forest Path
node.description: Black water laps gently against the bayou shore, tickling the bushy clusters of sedge that have made their home on the swath of soggy earth. A faint path proceeds north, away from the swamp and into the neighboring forest.

node.name: Forest Path
node.description: The air here is noticeably lighter and fresher than down in the bayou, despite the traces of errant swamp fog that linger on the damp forested path.

node.name: Forest Path
node.description: As the forest continues to thicken to the north, teeming brackens begin to overrun sections of the faint path with their leafy fronds. Further off the trail, a ruffed grouse scratches through the foliage in search of food.

node.name: Forest Path
node.description: The faint path continues to wend through crowded timberland, sheltered by the thick canopy of close-knit branches above. Bracken fills the space between trunks, forming a low wall of verdant underbrush.

node.name: Forest Path
node.description: The meandering path arrives at a small glade hidden amidst the dense timbers of Dragon's Breath Forest. Tiny wildflowers dot the clearing, dappling the grassy area with points of pink and blue.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Muddy Slope
node.description: Slick, sludgy runoff coats the limestone incline, with precious little available to grasp for support. Below, the dark bayou stretches ominously eastward.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou
node.description: The trunk of an uprooted water elm rests against a craggy overhang here, creating a naturally secluded alcove along the glen path that's further concealed by a thick screen of dangling vines. Occasionally, the wet slap of droplets hitting muddy ground punctuates the chorus of frogs and insects that drifts in through the bordering swamp reeds.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Nirefrei Falls
node.description: Blocking southern passage but providing a magnificent waterfall vista, the Nirefrei River tumbles down timeworn channels in the limestone cliff face and flows into the swamp's black embrace as a vast wall of broken rivulets. A mossy path leads down off the ridge and towards the dark bayou below.

node.name: Darkmist Moor
node.description: Grass-covered upland rolls drearily westward beneath a thin veil of mist. An empty streambed snakes through the variegated waste and arrives here at the edge of the moor, where an apparent mudslide has taken out a hefty portion of the bluffs that overlook the eastern bayou.

node.name: Darkmist Moor
node.description: The weeds and grasses of the moorland shy away from the windswept bluff that marks its eastern border, leaving blue-grey lichen to predominate the stony ridge. With no reluctance of its own, a low layer of wispy mist cascades over the edge of the cliff.

node.name: Darkmist Moor
node.description: The weeds and grasses of the moorland shy away from the windswept bluff that marks its eastern border, leaving blue-grey lichen to predominate the stony ridge. With no reluctance of its own, a low layer of wispy mist cascades over the edge of the cliff.

node.name: Darkmist Moor
node.description: Silence blankets the moorland almost as heavily as the ubiquitous lichens and weeds. With footfall muted by the damp turf and misty atmosphere, only the occasional screech of an overhead hawk cuts through the relentless quiet.

node.name: Darkmist Moor
node.description: Clusters of heather dot the grassy incline that rolls gently westward into the vast expanse of moorland. To the east, the view of the dark bayou slowly disappears behind a curtain of fog.

node.name: Darkmist Moor
node.description: The landscape stretches uneventfully outward in all directions, with only the occasional bush or scrubby tree peeking above the tall grasses that prevail along the rolling moorlands.

node.name: Darkmist Moor
node.description: Torn up grasses reveal several patches of freshly disturbed earth scattered about the area. Bits of old bone lie amongst the mud, mist, and claw marks.

node.name: Darkmist Moor
node.description: The landscape stretches uneventfully outward in all directions, with only the occasional bush or scrubby tree peeking above the tall grasses that prevail along the rolling moorlands.

node.name: Darkmist Moor
node.description: Dreary hues domineer the mist-veiled landscape. Half hidden beneath a shriveled oleander shrub, the freshly turned earth of a small animal burrow servers as reminder that the moor plays host to a thriving ecosystem despite its rather desolate presentation.

node.name: Darkmist Moor
node.description: The landscape stretches uneventfully outward in all directions, with only the occasional bush or scrubby tree peeking above the tall grasses that prevail along the rolling moorlands.

node.name: Darkmist Moor
node.description: Clumps of torn-up heather have been used to camouflage a short lean-to propped against the side of a lichen-coated outcropping of rocks. There are traces of recent activity in the form of footsteps and flattened weeds, but any clues or personal effects of the former occupant are now long gone.

node.name: Darkmist Moor
node.description: Broad slopes and inclines undulate smoothly across the grass-covered moorland, only occasionally interrupted by an errant tree or boulder in the distance. A patchy white mist drifts languidly over the hillsides, looking not unlike an endless flock of ghostly sheep grazing far off.

node.name: Darkmist Moor
node.description: Sparse shrubs do little to break the monotony of the surrounding moorlands. To the northwest, the natural path between grassy hillocks meanders down into a secluded gully.

node.name: Darkmist Moor
node.description: Thick mist has collected in the depression of this quiet gully, enhancing its natural seclusion. A damp pile of cinders, the recent remains of a small campfire, smolers in the dewy grass near a stunted juniper.

node.name: Darkmist Moor
node.description: The landscape stretches uneventfully outward in all directions, with only the occasional bush or scrubby tree peeking above the tall grasses that prevail along the rolling moorlands.

node.name: Darkmist Moor
node.description: Open moorland sprawls as far as the eye can see. A lone oak endures the elements on a nearby hillock, its haggard trunk distorted by years of exposure to the unhindered wind.

node.name: Darkmist Moor
node.description: Low hillocks fronting pale yellow weeds roll across the moorland like waves on a calm sea. Sporadic boulders crest the grassy swells, breaking up the flaxen expanse with dark smudges of blue and grey.

node.name: Darkmist Moor
node.description: Low boulders coated in blue-grey lichen dot the terrain, looking very much at home amidst the muted greens and yellows of the drab moorland grasses.

node.name: Darkmist Moor
node.description: Low boulders coated in blue-grey lichen dot the terrain, looking very much at home amidst the muted greens and yellows of the drab moorland grasses.

node.name: Darkmist Moor
node.description: Cranberry vines curl around a little spring bubbling up from a rocky cleft in the terrain. A few clusters of withered fruit cling to the stubby-leafed plants, but most of this season's harvest seems to have been nibbled away by hungry wildlife.

node.name: Darkmist Moor
node.description: Cotton-grass sways freely in the open air, the panoply of fluffy white seed heads susceptible to even the gentlest of breezes. A rusted blade lies forgotten and half-buried in the scraggly sward, its decay accelerated by the steadfast dew and inexorable mists that dampen the environment.

node.name: Darkmist Moor
node.description: The mottled landscape shifts in muted shades of yellow, green, and blue-grey as weeds, scrub, and stone vie lazily for dominance of the open waste. Bleached bones occasionally speckle the scenery with off-white in places where the vegetation is especially sparse.

node.name: Darkmist Moor
node.description: The weeds and grasses of the moorland shy away from the windswept bluff that marks its eastern border, leaving blue-grey lichen to predominate the stony ridge. With no reluctance of its own, a low layer of wispy mist cascades over the edge of the cliff.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Muddy Slope
node.description: Slick, sludgy runoff coats the limestone incline, with precious little available to grasp for support. Below, the dark bayou stretches ominously eastward.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Muddy Slope
node.description: Slick, sludgy runoff coats the limestone incline, with precious little available to grasp for support. Below, the dark bayou stretches ominously eastward.

node.name: Boleausun Bayou, Muddy Slope
node.description: Slick, sludgy runoff coats the limestone incline, with precious little available to grasp for support. Below, the dark bayou stretches ominously eastward.

node.name: Black Fang Encampment, Cookery
node.description: Preserved foodstuffs crowd makeshift shelving along the hut walls, while a portable cast iron stove sits heavy on the plank floor, causing it to sag slightly. A cloud of acrid smoke swirls about the room with no apparent motivation to escape through the ventilation hatch overhead.

node.name: Black Fang Encampment, Supply Tent
node.description: Empty wooden boxes clutter this no-frills, mildew-scented storage space. In the far corner of the dim tent, a basket of crumpled old uniforms has spilled onto the floor.

node.name: Black Fang Encampment, Dock
node.description: A low dock juts off the western edge of the encampment here, a solitary oil lantern swaying overhead but failing to adequately illuminate the flimsy plank pier. Moored to one of the pilings, a leaky old rowboat has begun taking on water.

node.name: Black Fang Encampment, Meeting Hall
node.description: Aside from some nondescript crates pushed up against the cypress plank walls, a Black Fang banner and a crude podium are the only notable features of this long, broad room.

node.name: Jademist Shore
node.description: A high embankment conspires with the prevalent mist to isolate a dark stretch of shoreline here along the Jademist River. Gnarled roots from ancient trees growing further up the bank are tangled into a natural retaining wall that camouflages an unobtrusive cave set into the earthen slope.

node.name: Jademist Shore
node.description: Soupy mist overwhelms the forest path, onerously absorbing light and muffling sound to an extent that makes navigation nearly impossible. With nothing visible beyond an arm's length in any direction, the only available guides are the gurgle of running water and a hazy illumination beckoning from the northeast.

node.name: Shadowy Safehouse
node.description: Fresh cedar buttressing, plush fur rugs, and decorative oil lamps make a serviceable hideout from what would otherwise be a dank and ordinary cave. Pushed up against the fictile walls, shelves laden with fastidiously organized sundries and armaments are illuminated by the flickering lamplight.

node.name: Black Fang Encampment, Bunkhouse
node.description: Little more than a windowless shack lined with bedrolls, this meager room seems to function as shabby sleeping quarters. A severe slant in the warped flooring further contends with any notion of a comfortable night's rest.

node.name: Black Fang Encampment, Bunkhouse Loft
node.description: Another row of lumpy cots occupies the shallow loft that runs above the main bunkhouse floor. Canvas partitions segregate a few of the more serviceable beds, providing scant privacy for what might be some sort of sparse officers' quarters.

node.name: Black Fang Encampment
node.description: The uneven plank walkway zigzags over the swamp, its course evidently dictated by suitable piling placement more than any particular architectural design.

node.name: Black Fang Encampment
node.description: Veiled in swamp fog, rough-hewn cypress planks creak plaintively as the boardwalk totters under the weight of its structural burden and the unremitting slosh of the black bayou below.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Crystal Monolith
node.description: Even from its abased foundation upon the lowest of the levitating islands, the crystal monolith at the gardens' center dwarfs the surrounding terraces. Cut from a single colossal shard of translucent quartz, the towering edifice rises several hundred feet, stopping just short of the shifting sphere of light that surrounds the grounds. Hovering nearby, a collection of stepping stones offers dubious access into the soaring gardens.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Dusk Terrace
node.description: Reflecting the soft light of a flame-wreathed wolf sculpture, a polished granite wall hems the terrace's inner edge here, an intricate layer of script just barely visible across its eventide surface. Set atop the outer balustrade at even intervals, fluted planters profuse with sunset-hued flora bask in the perpetual twilight that enfolds the area. A winter chill fills the air.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Dawn Terrace
node.description: Suffused in muted pink light, a vibrant undersea mosaic spans the inner wall of the terrace and provides a colorful backdrop for a small meditating statue of Eluned. The white coral goddess is seated in contemplative repose, gazing past a vine-draped sandstone colonnade and into the world beyond. A summer heat fills the air.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Midday Terrace
node.description: An arching goldwood arbor dense with firefall vines covers the walkway here, sheltering passerby from the artificially bright light that floods the area. Beside the shaded path, a neatly manicured lawn features a gleaming gold lion statue seated proudly atop a baroque gaethzen base. An autumn briskness fills the air.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Order
node.description: An autumn briskness fills the air. Framed by a crescent-shaped hedge of etrana bushes, a trio of lustrous boulders representing the Elanthian moons is arranged on the lawn in an apparent display of minimalist statuary. Sparrows flit among the stones, searching for bits of food in the grass.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Order
node.description: A winter chill fills the air. A furrowed slope showcases three neat rows of exotic fruit trees growing along the walkway here. Furthest up, Ilithic apple trees flaunt their distinctive coloration over stands of chokecherry and osage orange on the orchard's lower rise.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Order
node.description: An autumn briskness fills the air. Amidst a coppice of silverwillow, madder, and other weald foliage, a travertine statue of Lemicus stands ankle-deep in the clear waters of a small wooded pond. Wildflowers dot the grassy shoreline around her, trimming the garden dedication with a stippling of rich pastels.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Order
node.description: A winter chill fills the air. A mature vine leaf maple sits at the pinnacle of a meadowy hillock overlooking the promenade, stretching its low-lying boughs over a greatsword thrust firmly into an andesite plinth below. An unkempt blanket of scrubby brush covers the grassy slopes surrounding the tree.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Midnight Terrace
node.description: Massive obsidian columns sculpted to resemble poplar trees confine the terrace's unpaved quadrangle. Shadowy seordstone-inlaid lanterns dangle from their glossy black boughs, drenching the central topiary thicket that dominates the lawn in an unnatural darkness. A spring warmth fills the air.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Chaos
node.description: The fresh warmth of spring hangs heavy in the air here. Unlandscaped, this arid section of promenade has been left to grow wild with untamed natural beauty. Waves of golden grass sway alongside the beaten dirt walkway, punctuated by the cheerful colors of prairie scrub flowering throughout the leafy grama. Nearly hidden by the waist-high vegetation, a broad footbridge spans a crevasse cutting across the bucolic terrain.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Chaos
node.description: A spring warmth fills the air. Patterned with rippling circles, a tract of freshly raked sand abuts the flagstone walkway as it snakes along this edge of the floating gardens. Erupting from the pallid gravel, jagged serpentinite spears pierce the air and arc overhead like dark talons closing in on the promenade. A tight webbing of firefall vines ensnares the sinister stones.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Chaos
node.description: The dry swelter of summer hangs heavy in the air here. Deep turquoise waters fill this sunken section of promenade, the garden walkway yielding to a series of stepping stones over the shimmering jewel-toned pool. Rife with tropical splendor and spattered with variegated hibiscus, an emerald facade of lush jungle foliage rings the pool, while colorful sandflowers and dustanjis blossoms speckle its mossy banks. At the edge of the pool, an acenite likeness of Kerenhappuch spins colorfully painted dancing skirts that dissolve into a rainbow of flora at her feet.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Chaos
node.description: A summer heat fills the air. Engulfed by a vicious overgrowth of briars, the promenade threads between blackberry bushes tangled with other thorny shrubs to form a dense tunnel around the walkway. Halfway through the shadowy passage, a small shrine to Dergati is sheltered amongst the brambles.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Crystal Monolith
node.description: Even from its abased foundation upon the lowest of the levitating islands, the crystal monolith at the gardens' center dwarfs the surrounding terraces. Cut from a single colossal shard of translucent quartz, the towering edifice rises several hundred feet, stopping just short of the shifting sphere of light that surrounds the grounds. Hovering nearby, a collection of stepping stones offers dubious access into the soaring gardens.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Dusk Terrace
node.description: Reflecting the soft light of a flame-wreathed wolf sculpture, a polished granite wall hems the terrace's inner edge here, an intricate layer of script just barely visible across its eventide surface. Set atop the outer balustrade at even intervals, fluted planters profuse with sunset-hued flora bask in the perpetual twilight that enfolds the area. A winter chill fills the air.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Dawn Terrace
node.description: Suffused in muted pink light, a vibrant undersea mosaic spans the inner wall of the terrace and provides a colorful backdrop for a small meditating statue of Eluned. The white coral goddess is seated in contemplative repose, gazing past a vine-draped sandstone colonnade and into the world beyond. A summer heat fills the air.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Midday Terrace
node.description: An arching goldwood arbor dense with firefall vines covers the walkway here, sheltering passerby from the artificially bright light that floods the area. Beside the shaded path, a neatly manicured lawn features a gleaming gold lion statue seated proudly atop a baroque gaethzen base. An autumn briskness fills the air.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Chaos
node.description: The crisp tang of autumn hangs heavy in the air here. Pressing into the walkway from all directions, a vicious overgrowth of briars strangles the promenade, the mass of rampant thorns heavily laden with different varieties of dark, ripe berry. Cloistered halfway through the bramble tunnel, a small shrine to Dergati stands in shadow.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Chaos
node.description: An autumn briskness fills the air. The ground beneath the promenade sinks abruptly here, the garden walkway yielding to a series of stepping stones over the deep turquoise pool that fills the depression. Dense jungle foliage rings the pool, and at its mossy edge, an acenite likeness of Kerenhappuch spins her colorfully painted skirts amid the lush plant life thriving around her.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Chaos
node.description: A summer heat fills the air. Little more than a stretch of parched earth, this section of garden promenade shows no signs of landscaping. Only a random smattering of prairie scrub dots the desolate terrain to either side of the beaten dirt walkway. A narrow crevasse cuts across the dusty tract, spanned by a broad footbridge.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Chaos
node.description: A summer heat fills the air. Patterned with rippling circles, a tract of freshly raked sand abuts the flagstone walkway as it snakes along this edge of the floating gardens. Erupting from the pallid gravel, jagged serpentinite spears pierce the air and arc overhead like dark talons closing in on the promenade. A tight webbing of firefall vines ensnares the sinister stones.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Order
node.description: A winter chill fills the air. Sparrows flit among the stones, searching for bits of food in the grass.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Order
node.description: The piercing chill of winter hangs heavy in the air here. Swathed in fresh crystalline snow, a travertine statue of Lemicus sports a gown of sparkling white, with a sweeping train of violet-tinged lotus blossoms gathered on the frozen pond around her ankles. Surrounding the pool, silverwillow trees, madder shrubs, and other specimens of weald foliage slumber peacefully beneath their snowy blankets.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Crystal Monolith
node.description: Even from its abased foundation upon the lowest of the levitating islands, the crystal monolith at the gardens' center dwarfs the surrounding terraces. node.name: Ashala'taman, Midday Terrace
node.description: An arching goldwood arbor dense with firefall vines covers the walkway here, sheltering passerby from the artificially bright light that floods the area. Beside the shaded path, a neatly manicured lawn features a gleaming gold lion statue seated proudly atop a baroque gaethzen base. A summer heat fills the air.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Order
node.description: A summer heat fills the air. A mature vine leaf maple sits at the pinnacle of a meadowy hillock overlooking the promenade, stretching its low-lying boughs over a greatsword thrust firmly into an andesite plinth below. An unkempt blanket of scrubby brush covers the grassy slopes surrounding the tree.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Order
node.description: The dry swelter of summer hangs heavy in the air here. Arranged in three neat rows atop a furrowed slope, an exotic fruit orchard bursts with lively exuberance, some trees still in the final stages of glorious bloom and others already laden with fully ripe fruit. Ilithic apple trees try to steal the show with lovely purple blossoms and deep blue fruit, while stands of chokecherry and osage orange compete with their own more modest adornments.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Order
node.description: The fresh warmth of spring hangs heavy in the air here. Interspersed with gorgeous ebon hollyhocks, a crescent-shaped hedge of etrana bushes boasts a thriving abundance of crimson and cobalt flowers that perfume the area with a rich, elusive scent. Within the bounded semicircle, a trio of lustrous boulders representing the Elanthian moons has been arranged as an apparent display of minimalist statuary, reinforcing the bold tricolor palette showcased by the surrounding flora.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Order

Beneath its vividly decked boughs, a gleaming greatsword has been thrust into an andesite plinth amidst a colorful blanket of flower-speckled brush.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Order
node.description: An autumn briskness fills the air. A furrowed slope showcases three neat rows of exotic fruit trees growing along the walkway here. Furthest up, Ilithic apple trees flaunt their distinctive coloration over stands of chokecherry and osage orange on the orchard's lower rise.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Order
node.description: A summer heat fills the air. Framed by a crescent-shaped hedge of etrana bushes, a trio of lustrous boulders representing the Elanthian moons is arranged on the lawn in an apparent display of minimalist statuary. Sparrows flit among the stones, searching for bits of food in the grass.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Order
node.description: A summer heat fills the air. Amidst a coppice of silverwillow, madder, and other weald foliage, a travertine statue of Lemicus stands ankle-deep in the clear waters of a small wooded pond. Wildflowers dot the grassy shoreline around her, trimming the garden dedication with a stippling of rich pastels.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Midday Terrace
node.description: An arching goldwood arbor dense with firefall vines covers the walkway here, sheltering passerby from the artificially bright light that floods the area. Beside the shaded path, a neatly manicured lawn features a gleaming gold lion statue seated proudly atop a baroque gaethzen base. A spring warmth fills the air.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Chaos
node.description: A spring warmth fills the air. Engulfed by a vicious overgrowth of briars, the promenade threads between blackberry bushes tangled with other thorny shrubs to form a dense tunnel around the walkway. Halfway through the shadowy passage, a small shrine to Dergati is sheltered amongst the brambles.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Chaos
node.description: A spring warmth fills the air. The ground beneath the promenade sinks abruptly here, the garden walkway yielding to a series of stepping stones over the deep turquoise pool that fills the depression. Dense jungle foliage rings the pool, and at its mossy edge, an acenite likeness of Kerenhappuch spins her colorfully painted skirts amid the lush plant life thriving around her.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Chaos
node.description: A winter chill fills the air. Little more than a stretch of parched earth, this section of garden promenade shows no signs of landscaping. Only a random smattering of prairie scrub dots the desolate terrain to either side of the beaten dirt walkway. A narrow crevasse cuts across the dusty tract, spanned by a broad footbridge.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Chaos
node.description: The piercing chill of winter hangs heavy in the air here. Snaking through a glittering expanse of fresh powder snow, the swept flagstone walkway runs beneath a series of jagged serpentinite spears that arc overhead like frost-coated talons closing in on the promenade. Shriveled firefall vines dangle from the sinister projections, resembling icy cobwebs clinging to dark stone claws.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Crystal Monolith
node.description: Even from its abased foundation upon the lowest of the levitating islands, the crystal monolith at the gardens' center dwarfs the surrounding terraces. Cut from a single colossal shard of translucent quartz, the towering edifice rises several hundred feet, stopping just short of the shifting sphere of light that surrounds the grounds. Hovering nearby, a collection of stepping stones offers dubious access into the soaring gardens.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Dawn Terrace
node.description: Suffused in muted pink light, a vibrant undersea mosaic spans the inner wall of the terrace and provides a colorful backdrop for a small meditating statue of Eluned. The white coral goddess is seated in contemplative repose, gazing past a vine-draped sandstone colonnade and into the world beyond. An autumn briskness fills the air.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Dusk Terrace
node.description: Reflecting the soft light of a flame-wreathed wolf sculpture, a polished granite wall hems the terrace's inner edge here, an intricate layer of script just barely visible across its eventide surface. Set atop the outer balustrade at even intervals, fluted planters profuse with sunset-hued flora bask in the perpetual twilight that enfolds the area. A spring warmth fills the air.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Midnight Terrace
node.description: Massive obsidian columns sculpted to resemble poplar trees confine the terrace's unpaved quadrangle. Shadowy seordstone-inlaid lanterns dangle from their glossy black boughs, drenching the central topiary thicket that dominates the lawn in an unnatural darkness. A summer heat fills the air.

An unkempt blanket of scrubby brush covers the grassy slopes surrounding the tree.

node.description: Massive obsidian columns sculpted to resemble poplar trees confine the terrace's unpaved quadrangle. Shadowy seordstone-inlaid lanterns dangle from their glossy black boughs, drenching the central topiary thicket that dominates the lawn in an unnatural darkness. A summer heat fills the air.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Chaos
node.description: A summer heat fills the air. Engulfed by a vicious overgrowth of briars, the promenade threads between blackberry bushes tangled with other thorny shrubs to form a dense tunnel around the walkway. Halfway through the shadowy passage, a small shrine to Dergati is sheltered amongst the brambles.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Chaos
node.description: The dry swelter of summer hangs heavy in the air here. Deep turquoise waters fill this sunken section of promenade, the garden walkway yielding to a series of stepping stones over the shimmering jewel-toned pool. Rife with tropical splendor and spattered with variegated hibiscus, an emerald facade of lush jungle foliage rings the pool, while colorful sandflowers and dustanjis blossoms speckle its mossy banks. At the edge of the pool, an acenite likeness of Kerenhappuch spins colorfully painted dancing skirts that dissolve into a rainbow of flora at her feet.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Chaos
node.description: The fresh warmth of spring hangs heavy in the air here. Unlandscaped, this arid section of promenade has been left to grow wild with untamed natural beauty. Waves of golden grass sway alongside the beaten dirt walkway, punctuated by the cheerful colors of prairie scrub flowering throughout the leafy grama. Nearly hidden by the waist-high vegetation, a broad footbridge spans a crevasse cutting across the bucolic terrain.

node.name: Ashala'taman, Promenade of Chaos
node.description: A spring warmth fills the air. Patterned with rippling circles, a tract of freshly raked sand abuts the flagstone walkway as it snakes along this edge of the floating gardens. Erupting from the pallid gravel, jagged serpentinite spears pierce the air and arc overhead like dark talons closing in on the promenade. A tight webbing of firefall vines ensnares the sinister stones.

node.name: Observation Chamber
node.description: The tunnel opens into the cavernous basin of a large sinkhole here, fresh night air flooding in through the open ceiling above. Rendered in lines of silvery chalk, an intricate geometric glyph dominates the earthen cave floor.

The tunnel opens into the cavernous basin of a large sinkhole here, sunlight and fresh air flooding in through the open ceiling above. Rendered in lines of silvery chalk, an intricate geometric glyph dominates the earthen cave floor.

node.name: Shadowy Safehouse, Bloodgrass Annex
node.description: Branching off from the main cavern to the north, this side chamber is festooned with braided bloodgrass garlands. Pushed up against the craggy walls, shelves laden with fastidiously organized sundries and armaments are illuminated by flickering oil lamps.

node.name: Shadowy Safehouse, Jademoss Annex
node.description: Tunneled further south from the main cavern, this narrow chamber is edged with blue-green clusters of jademoss. Pushed up against the rocky walls, shelves laden with fastidiously organized sundries and armaments are illuminated by flickering oil lamps.

node.name: Shadowy Safehouse, Snowcatcher Annex
node.description: Tunneled further south from the main cavern, this narrow chamber is wreathed in fragrant snowcatch lotus blossoms. Pushed up against the smooth walls, shelves laden with fastidiously organized sundries and armaments are illuminated by blown-glass oil lamps.
